productDisplayName: Lino Perros Women Classic Olive Handbag
description: Update your style quotient with ease by adding this stylish, olive green bag from lino perros to your accessory collection. Roomy and comfortable to carry, the smooth silhouette of this bag blends well with any outfit. Height: 30 cm Width: 41 cm Depth: 14 cm Made of synthetic leather and jute for durability Has one main roomy, zipped compartment with two inner zipped compartments and an organiser pouch for essentials Two short handles woven through metallic loops and one long removable, adjustable strap for carrying ease and style Zipped pocket at the back Loop and clasp design on the sides and a patch design on the front for style Stitch detailing and branded zips Care Wipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust
